_rationale: Unified on the multi-directory `populated` corpus — the widest mode (REPOSITORY MAP + HEALTH + MODULES + STATISTICS + OBJECT IDs). This is the strongest single regression guard on the engine path: it locks the computed token count (modules*20+health50+stats50+20=200), per-directory repository map, average complexity, the MODULES aggregate (total/cohesion/coupling), and the full STATISTICS block (complexity avg/median, package coupling avg/max, cohesion avg/min, maintainability index) — all of which were previously hardcoded constants.

tiers._rationale_stable: Byte-identical after masking the non-deterministic / known-divergent fragments. Under guard: header+tokens, REPOSITORY MAP, complexity, detailed_smells, MODULES aggregate line, and the STATISTICS coupling/cohesion/maintainability/complexity numbers from CouplingAnalyzer + HealthAnalyzer.

text_normalize._rationale_replace: Same object-id / smells-order / purity / problematic_symbols masks as populated-overview (see that descriptor). Additionally: the complexity `distribution` line is order-masked (Go emits low/medium/high from a map in random order). The STATISTICS `quality` line's trailing purity= field is masked (timing-dependent purity ratio). The MODULES aggregate `coupling=` field is masked because Go emits a hardcoded 0.30 placeholder while C++ now computes real per-package coupling from CouplingAnalyzer (cohesion + the STATISTICS coupling/cohesion stay byte-checked). The per-module MODULES detail lines (`  name: type=...`) are removed (Go emits them in map-iteration order AND counts per-module functions differently — follow-up). The high-incoming-refs smell label is normalized (C++ renames Go's mislabeled `shotgun-surgery` to `high-fan-in`). The `== VOCABULARY ==` block is a C++-only enhancement with no Go counterpart and is stripped before comparison.
